display_html: type VoronoiDiagram point vtxData = VoronoiDiagram_ (NumType point) point vtxData
name: VoronoiDiagram

display_html:
data VoronoiDiagram_ r point vtxData
  • = AllColinear !(Alternating Vector (VerticalOrLineEQ r) point)
  • | ConnectedVD !(VoronoiDiagram' (MDVertex r point vtxData) point)
name: VoronoiDiagram_ AllColinear ConnectedVD

display_html: newtype VoronoiDiagram' vertex point = VoronoiDiagram (MinimizationDiagram (NumType point) vertex point)
name: VoronoiDiagram' VoronoiDiagram
